hero.subline: From rooftop solar to intelligent storage – we guide you holistically on your path to energy independence.

services_private.title:
Your Home,
Your Energy.
services_private.subtitle: Tailored energy solutions for private households – from initial consultation to long-term operation.

items.title: Solar Rooftop Systems
items.description: Premium photovoltaic installations for your roof. Maximum efficiency, minimal effort.

items.title: Home Battery Storage
items.description: Smart battery storage for your self-generated energy – even at night or on cloudy days.

items.title: EV Charging Solutions
items.description: Charge your electric vehicle at home smartly and cheaply with your own solar power.

items.title: Energy Monitoring
items.description: Keep track of your consumption at all times – with our smart home-integrated monitoring system.

items.title: Maintenance & Service
items.description: All-inclusive package: regular maintenance, fast service and long-term care for your system.

services_business.title:
Energy for
Your Business.
services_business.subtitle: Professional energy solutions for commercial and industrial use – economical, sustainable and scalable.

items.title: Commercial Solar Installations
items.description: Large-scale PV systems for commercial properties, industrial and logistics facilities.

items.title: Industrial Energy Storage
items.description: Scalable battery storage systems for industrial requirements and peak load optimization.

items.title: Energy Audits & Consulting
items.description: Professional analysis of your energy consumption with concrete recommendations for action.

items.title: Grid Integration & PPAs
items.description: Direct grid feed-in and Power Purchase Agreements for maximum economic efficiency.

items.title: On-site Generation & Microgrids
items.description: Self-sufficient energy supply for industrial and commercial parks – independent of the public grid.

items.title: O&M Contracts
items.description: Long-term operations management and monitoring for maximum plant availability and returns.

about.pull_quote: Energy is more than electricity – it is the foundation for a self-determined life.
paragraphs: Holigy was founded with a clear vision: to understand the energy transition not as a technical problem, but as a holistic transformation.
We believe that sustainable energy is most effective when it is integrated into the lives of our customers – not imposed, but self-evident.
From the first consultation to years of support, we accompany you with expertise, passion and genuine interest in your energy future.

team.name: Alexander Reuter
team.bio: 15 years of experience in the energy sector. Pioneer for integrated energy solutions.

team.name: Dr. Sarah Müller
team.bio: Specialist in photovoltaics and storage systems with a doctorate in electrical engineering.

team.name: Thomas Wagner
team.bio: Expert in individual energy concepts and long-term customer relationships.

team.name: Julia Schneider
team.bio: Coordinates our projects with precision – from planning to commissioning.

items.title: Tailor-made
items.description: No standard solutions. Every project is individually planned and tailored to your needs.

items.title: End-to-End
items.description: From consulting through installation to ongoing operations – everything from a single source.

items.title: Long-term Partnership
items.description: We think in decades, not quarters. Your system is our responsibility.

items.title: Local Expertise
items.description: Deep understanding of regional conditions, grid requirements and subsidy programs.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.content:
This privacy policy informs you about the nature, scope and purpose of the processing of personal data within our online offering.

1. Controller
Holigy GmbH, Energiestraße 12, 80331 Munich

2. Collection and Use of Data
We collect and use personal data only to the extent necessary for the provision of our services.

3. Contact Form
When you contact us via the contact form, your details from the form will be stored for the purpose of processing your inquiry.

4. Your Rights
You have the right to information, correction, deletion and restriction of the processing of your personal data.
